name: leave_a_conversation
description: Leaves a slack conversation given its channel id; fails if leaving as the last member of a private channel or if used on a slack connect channel.

channel.description:
ID of the conversation to leave (e.g., C1234567890). Despite `default=None` in the schema, this ID is functionally required by the Slack API.
Examples:
  "C1234567890"
  "D9876543210"
  "G12345ABCDE"
